name: taskflow-monorepo
description: ADHD TaskFlow — voice-first brain-dump-to-schedule app. npm workspaces root for client (Vite/React) and server (Express Groq-Whisper proxy).

scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,server -c blue,green "npm run dev -w client" "npm run dev -w server"
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w client && npm run lint -w server && eslint api
